versions.label: v0

notes.text: [WORKFLOW] Drive this app via window.partwright (see /ai.md). Use runAndSave(code, label, assertions) for iterations; addSessionNote with [REQUIREMENT]/[DECISION]/[MEASUREMENT]/[FEEDBACK]/[ATTEMPT]/[TODO] prefixes; getSessionContext() when resuming.
[DECISION] Reaching-up hand built print-safe: every overhang stays <=30° from vertical so it FDM-prints support-free.

[DECISION] Anatomy: tapered cylinder wrist, hulled-ellipsoid hand body with cupped palm, thenar pad, 4 fingers with 3 phalanges each (visible PIP/DIP/MCP knuckle bumps via larger joint spheres), opposing thumb with 2 phalanges.

[DECISION] Nails are flat-topped rounded-rect prisms embedded in the dorsal side of each distal phalanx. Top face painted nail-colored via paintRegion at tolerance 0.999, leaning on the sharp 90° edge between cap and side wall to confine the flood-fill.
